name: IRS Directory of Federal Tax Return Preparers
description: Official public directory covering certain federal tax return preparers with active PTINs and recognized credentials or qualifications.
coverage: The IRS says the directory covers certain preparers with active PTINs who hold recognized credentials such as enrolled agent, CPA, attorney, enrolled actuary, enrolled retirement plan agent, or Annual Filing Season Program participation.
caveats: The directory does not include every paid preparer.
Preparers may opt out of the directory.
IRS FAQ says updates are weekly and can take up to four weeks to appear.

name: IRS enrolled agent verification
description: Official verification path for enrolled-agent status and related IRS credential materials.
coverage: This is a high-trust verification route for the EA credential rather than a broad commercial directory.
caveats: This is partly a credential-verification workflow, not a general marketplace listing.
It should be used as a trust layer rather than as a recommendation engine.

sources.label: Verify the status of an enrolled agent

authority: CPA Verify / state boards of accountancy
name: CPA Verify
description: Public CPA lookup tool populated from official state board data.
coverage: CPA Verify describes itself as a free public CPA lookup tool populated by official state regulatory data from boards of accountancy.
caveats: Update timing varies by state board.
This is a credential lookup, not a rating platform.

name: TPB Register
description: Official Australian public register for tax practitioners.
coverage: The Tax Practitioners Board says the public can search the register using a legal or registration name, ASIC registered business name, or registration number to verify whether a tax practitioner is registered.
caveats: Some displayed details are configurable by the practitioner.
Directory presence should be treated as verification, not endorsement.

authority: Institute of Chartered Accountants in England and Wales
name: ICAEW Find a Chartered Accountant
description: Professional directory covering chartered accountants, ICAEW-licensed individuals, and licensed or accredited firms.
coverage: This directory helps users search for UK accounting professionals and firms through a professional-body directory with high trust value.
whatToCapture: business advice service participation if shown
caveats: This is a professional-body directory rather than a government licensing register.
A listing is not the same thing as a TaxGuided recommendation.

sources.label: Find a chartered accountant or firm
